counterexample_policy.defeating_evidence: The guard validates an input boundary where nullability can be observed from external callers or deserialized payloads.
counterexample_policy.when_rule_does_not_apply: Do not apply when the value can be absent at runtime through IO, deserialization, plugin boundaries, or typed Optional contracts.

rules.forward_agent_policy: Avoid adding defensive null checks unless a reachable boundary can supply null.
rules.post_optimizer_policy: Remove impossible null checks only when flow and type evidence are deterministic.

counterexample_policy.defeating_evidence: The extracted helper is reused across independently evolving call paths with shared invariants.
counterexample_policy.when_rule_does_not_apply: Do not apply when extraction provides real reuse or isolates complexity that would otherwise obscure correctness.

rules.forward_agent_policy: Prefer inline logic when extraction does not reduce complexity or produce reuse.
rules.post_optimizer_policy: Flag likely ceremonial helper extraction and require context review before rewrite.

counterexample_policy.defeating_evidence: The text introduces domain assumptions, threat model context, or user-actionable guidance not inferable from code.
counterexample_policy.when_rule_does_not_apply: Do not apply when narration carries otherwise hidden invariants, risk framing, or critical onboarding detail.

rules.forward_agent_policy: Write comments only when they add semantics not visible in executable logic.
rules.post_optimizer_policy: Do not auto-delete commentary; emit advisory findings and ask for intent clarification.

counterexample_policy.defeating_evidence: Symmetric branch structure is required by an explicit protocol matrix or paired safety policy.
counterexample_policy.when_rule_does_not_apply: Do not apply when regularity is mandated by a documented domain contract or compliance requirement.

rules.forward_agent_policy: Treat mirrored control flow as suspicious only when no domain contract explains the symmetry.
rules.post_optimizer_policy: Keep shape-regularity findings advisory in the first slice.

counterexample_policy.defeating_evidence: The artifact links file inventory to a clear intent rationale and user-impact statement.
counterexample_policy.when_rule_does_not_apply: Do not apply when structured file lists are required by release tooling but intent is still explicit.

rules.forward_agent_policy: Prefer intent-first summaries over touched-file recaps in meta artifacts.
rules.post_optimizer_policy: Propose intent-focused rewrites for changelog-style residue artifacts.
